_comment: Zed (zombie) renderer config. All paths relative to assets/. Each zed_type has 'skins' (alive variants), 'dead' (death animation variants), and optionally 'spawn_fx' (buried emerge), 'shadow' (jumper shadow layer). Poses in 'available_poses' are the only ones that exist for that skin — if a pose has directional frames they are keyed by direction (down/left/right/up); directionless animations (scream, stun, fly, etc.) use 'frames' key instead.
